transcript: Storbritannia Late night? What was that? Motor jam. Sometimes that happens. Last week I was stuck in here for 45 minutes. GUNFIRE Shit! GUNFIRE Need a jump? I love to wake up in the morning But keep dreaming without warning This day is gone
